# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

print("Wall boundaries:")
for r in [1, 27, 28, 40, 50, 63]:
    line = ascii_lines[r]
    transitions = []
    for c in range(63):
        if line[c] != line[c+1]:
            transitions.append((c, line[c], line[c+1]))
    if transitions:
        print(f"  Row {r}: {transitions}")

print("\nGreen and charcoal objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('N', 'c'):
        print(f"  {n['color']}: id={n['id']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
